@graph.schema:name: Marine Mammals Exploring the Oceans Pole to Pole - Canada
@graph.schema:description:
MEOP (Marine Mammals Exploring the Oceans Pole to Pole) is a consortium of international researchers dedicated to sharing animal-derived data and knowledge about the polar oceans. Collectively, MEOP demonstrates the power and cost-effectiveness of using marine mammals as data-collection platforms that can dramatically improve the ocean-observing system for biological and physical oceanographers.
Supporting institutions: the International Governance and Atlantic Seal Research Program, Fisheries and Oceans, Canada and the Greenland Institute of Natural Resources.

schema:geo.schema:description: Bounding box polygon with lat long (Y X) coordinate order.
